ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., grocery/pharmacy, parks) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the location can accommodate */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobility_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location type */,
  "mobility_score" REAL /* Mobility score indicating the level of activity in the location type */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the location on the given date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobility_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grocery_pharmacy" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "mobility_score" REAL /* Mobility score for grocery stores and pharmacies */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the location on the given date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grocery_pharmacy_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grocery_pharmacy_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "mobility_score" REAL /* Mobility score for parks */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the location on the given date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parks_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parks_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residential" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "mobility_score" REAL /* Mobility score for residential areas */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the location on the given date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residential_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residential_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retail_recreation" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "mobility_score" REAL /* Mobility score for retail and recreation centers */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the location on the given date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retail_recreation_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retail_recreation_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transit_stations" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "mobility_score" REAL /* Mobility score for transit stations */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the location on the given date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transit_stations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transit_stations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workplace" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "mobility_score" REAL /* Mobility score for workplaces */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits to the location on the given date */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workplace_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workplace_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator, policymaker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mobility_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the policy is applied */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the policy is applied */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Score indicating the expected impact of the policy on mobility and activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the event took place */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the event took place */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., holiday, festival, protest) */,
  "expected_impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the event on mobility and activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
